content.speakerText: Hi there! How can I help you today?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！今天需要帮您什么忙吗？
expectedAnswers: Hi! I'd like to buy some flowers for my mom.
Hey, I'm looking for birthday flowers—maybe something pink?
Just browsing for now, but thanks for asking!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确表达购物意图或礼貌拒绝
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合日常口语习惯，语气友好
关键词覆盖：使用场景关键词如 'flowers', 'birthday', 'buy', 'browsing'

content.speakerText: We've got fresh blooms in today—perfect for gifts!
content.speakerTextCn: 今天刚到新鲜花束，特别适合送礼！
expectedAnswers: Oh, that's perfect! I need something bright with roses.
Cool! What's your most popular arrangement?
Hmm, I'm not sure yet—do you have any tulips in stock?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：积极回应并引导店员推荐或表达偏好
语言准确性：使用恰当的形容词和疑问句结构
表达自然度：语气自然，符合真实对话节奏
关键词覆盖：使用 'fresh blooms', 'gifts', 'popular', 'arrangement', 'tulips' 等场景词

content.speakerText: Welcome to Petal & Leaf! Can I help you find something special?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎来到花叶坊！我能帮您找点特别的吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, I'm looking for a bouquet to celebrate my anniversary—something elegant and not too loud.
Actually, I'm just curious—what flowers are in season right now?
I'm not sure yet, but I'd love to see your most beautiful arrangement.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰表达需求、探索兴趣或礼貌犹豫
语言准确性：使用复合句和恰当修饰语（如 'elegant', 'not too loud'）
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合进店探索型顾客的语调
关键词覆盖：使用 'bouquet', 'celebrate', 'season', 'arrangement', 'elegant' 等高级场景词
